meaning: n.大胜的尝试,勇气的举动(显示演奏家技艺的壮丽的乐段)
examples: The film is directed with a technical bravura and visual splendour.
It was a bravura performance by Denzel Washington.
What little scholarship has existed on Ernest Hemingway—considering his stature—has focused on trying to unmask the man behind the bravura.
But once he found his groove, the multi-division champion put on a bravura boxing clinic.
The fact that the bravura concept required formidable structural ingenuity and improvised technology guaranteed problems.
